name: RFC 7515 A.1 - HS256 worked example (valid signature, fails policy: no aud)
description: The canonical HS256 example, byte-for-byte from the RFC (its header JSON even contains CRLF whitespace). The signature verifies against the RFC's key - which is why the rejection is a *claims* error, not a signature error - but the claim set has no aud, which Lacewing requires.
